CustomField.description: For a Company-organized Event, identify whether a Third Party Provider will be used or whether Viatris will organize it directly. For Event Sponsorship, identify the third party organization to receive Viatris's financial support for the event.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For a Company-organized Event, identify whether a Third Party Provider will be used or whether Viatris will organize it directly. For Event Sponsorship, identify the third party organization to receive Viatris's financial support for the event.
CustomField.label: Tthird party organization Name
